physics_geometry_summary.interpretation: The heat prior is a local parabolic-PDE smoothing operator over a highly sparse lesion support, not a learned global image classifier.

novelty_positioning_against_qsonet.qsonet_axis: architecture-level diffusion-MRI physics constraint on a 56-patient multi-shell cohort
novelty_positioning_against_qsonet.v92_media_axis: system-level, multi-site endpoint-regime transport law for ranking instability across structural-prior, CNN, residual, transformer and nnU-Net controls
novelty_positioning_against_qsonet.v92_pro_axis: dose-physics conditional-use boundary using RTDOSE/RTPLAN-compatible evidence rather than proxy geometric claims
novelty_positioning_against_qsonet.safe_claim: This is broader and more clinically guarded than QSO-Net, but not a claim of deployment readiness.
